Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Text: Ill emphasize how the rules interlock to prevent fraud ensure auditability and enforce regulatory requirements like Fair Lending or KYC

Text: Instead focus on the why how these rules collectively create a fault tolerant yet auditable system
